context: Tests whether the agent correctly extends package manager support across agent and script while maintaining manifest version sync

checklist.name: Agent workflow updated
checklist.description: agents/optimizer.md Step 1 includes conda detection (environment.yml → conda run), placed after pipenv in priority. Step 2/3 error handling includes conda install instructions.

checklist.name: Script runner detection updated
checklist.description: suggest-optimize.sh adds conda detection after pipenv, checking for environment.yml and setting RUNNER to conda run command. Priority order preserved: uv > poetry > pdm > pipenv > conda.

checklist.name: Version sync
checklist.description: plugin.json version bumped (minor). marketplace.json metadata.version and plugins[0].version both bumped to match plugin.json. All three version fields are identical.

checklist.name: Correct file placement
checklist.description: Only the specified files are modified. No new files are created. Changes are in agents/optimizer.md, scripts/suggest-optimize.sh, .claude-plugin/plugin.json, .claude-plugin/marketplace.json.
